title: commodity-cycle output
description: Canonical structured output for the commodity-cycle skill. Layer 1 (the data); Layer 2 (rendered drivers block + take) is described in references/rendering.md.

as_of.description: Local as-of date the run was anchored to.

fetched_at.description: UTC timestamp when the script ran.

name.description: Human-readable name for the target ETF.

window_days.description: Lookback in trading days for returns and rolling correlations (default 60).

signals.description: The per-driver reads for the target commodity.

dxy_correlation.description: Rolling window correlation of the commodity's daily returns vs UUP daily returns. Negative is normal for gold.

uup_return.description: UUP total return over the window (decimal).

effect.description: Directional effect on the commodity: correlation times UUP return. Negative = dollar headwind.

real_yield_correlation.description: Rolling window correlation vs the TIP-minus-IEF daily return spread (real-yield proxy).

tip_minus_ief_return.description: TIP return minus IEF return over the window (decimal). Positive = real yields falling.

effect.description: Directional effect: correlation times the real-yield spread return.

momentum_quintile.description: The commodity's window return ranked into a quintile (1..5) vs its trailing-year window returns.

miner_divergence.description: GLD vs GDX relative return over the window (gold only; null otherwise). Miners leading is constructive.

silver_comovement.description: Rolling window correlation GLD vs SLV (gold only; null otherwise). High co-movement means a broad metals move.

broad_commodity_comovement.description: Rolling window correlation of the target vs DBC (non-gold commodities only). Present in place of the miner/silver set.

setup.description: The macro setup label for the commodity right now.

take.description: One or two sentence read naming the dominant macro driver, miner and momentum confirmation.

tier_caveats.description: Honest caveats: rate-limit flags, missing history, proxy limitations, correlation instability.
